commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide the product/API/security direction before automation can safely repair this PR.; Needs attention: The diff introduces security-sensitive dependency graph and trusted-diagnostics surfaces that need maintainer/security review before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Add an approved diagnostics-consumer grant before subscribing — extensions/tokenomics/src/service.ts:169-174 - [P1] Store spe... (sha=8b4b4c28f3710fc539ecec3b93b73fefcc6c4073)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an installable `tokenomics` plugin with model-usage spend ingestion, a Gateway diagnostics report route, JSON-backed ledger/pricing files, docs, tests, package metadata, and lockfile entries.

PR surface: Source +1047, Tests +235, Docs +143, Config +51, Other +6. Total +1482 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR behavior from source inspection: current main only grants `internalDiagnostics` to `diagnostics-otel` and `diagnostics-prometheus`, while this service returns without subscribing when that grant is absent. I did not run a live Gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide the product/API/security direction before automation can safely repair this PR.

target.title: fix(discord,telegram,github-copilot,google-meet): bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Replace unbounded `await response.json()` with `readResponseWithLimit` (1 MiB cap)
across  bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM:4 extensions, preventing OOM from oversized upstream HTTP responses.

## Evidence

### Real HTTP bounded-read proof

```
node --import tsx test/_proof_bounded_json.mts

[proof] real server on :58033, cap=1048576 bytes, would-stream≈67108864 bytes
[proof] small server on :58034

PASS  oversized body: throws bounded cap error :: threw=true msg="Error: JSON response exceeds 1048576 bytes"
PASS  stream cancelled at cap: server sent ≈ cap bytes, not ~64 MiB :: bytesSent=1048576 (cap=1048576, would-stream=67108864)
PASS  happy path: small JSON parsed correctly :: status=ok id=batch-1
PASS  negative control: unbounded read buffers PAST cap :: buffered=33554457 bytes (> 1048576)

[proof] 4 PASS, 0 FAIL
```

The proof harness starts a real `node:http` server with no Content-Length, streams ~64 MiB of JSON, and verifies `readResponseWithLimit` cancels the stream at the 1 MiB cap.

_AI-assisted._
target.author: lsr911
